class BaseCommand:

class BaseCommand:
    """Base command class for Click commands.
    
    This class serves as the foundation for all Click command implementations.
    It provides the core functionality for creating CLI commands including
    argument parsing, option handling, and command execution logic.
    
    Attributes:
        name (str): The name of the command as it appears in the CLI
        callback (callable): The function to be executed when the command is invoked
        params (list): List of parameters (arguments and options) for the command
        help (str): Help text displayed for the command
        epilog (str): Text displayed at the end of help output
        short_help (str): Brief help text for the command
        options_metavar (str): Meta variable name for options in usage string
        add_help_option (bool): Whether to add the --help option automatically
        hidden (bool): Whether to hide the command from help output
        deprecated (bool): Whether the command is deprecated
        
    Methods:
        get_help(ctx): Returns formatted help text for the command
        invoke(ctx): Invokes the command with the given context
        get_usage(ctx): Returns the usage string for the command
        get_params(ctx): Returns list of parameters for the command
        parse_args(ctx, args): Parses command line arguments
        format_usage(ctx, formatter): Formats the usage line
        format_help(ctx, formatter): Formats the help text
        format_help_text(ctx, formatter): Formats the help text section
        format_options(ctx, formatter): Formats the options section
        format_epilog(ctx, formatter): Format
